description: Configure aluminum shell mass properties for the eCRM-001 model and generate a weight & balance report. Read the material specification file on the Desktop (~/Desktop/mass_spec.txt) for instructions on material properties and output format. For EVERY geometry component in the model, set its mass type to Shell, with the specified density and thickness. Run the Mass Properties analysis. Export the output to /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_massprops.txt, and write a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/mass_balance_report.txt.
